name: Light Fettucine Alfredo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over high heat, whisk together milk, garlic, flour, and cream cheese.
2. Bring to a boil, whisking constantly.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes or until thickened.
4. Add Parmesan cheese and whisk until blended.
5. Remove from heat and stir in Molly McButter.
6. Pour sauce over hot fettuccine.
7. Sprinkle with parsley and pepper if desired.
Per serving: 5 gm fat; 310 cal; 17 gm pro; 48 gm carbo; 550 mg sodium; 15 mg chol.
